name: io.github.ZahiriNatZuke/local-delegate
description: Delegate mechanical text tasks to a local OpenAI-compatible LLM to save Claude quota.

environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_DELEGATE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint (llama-swap, Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM). Default http://127.0.0.1:9292/v1

environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_DELEGATE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the endpoint, if it requires one.
